LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, OCT-22-2024 HEARING HELD RE: PLAINTIFF CSAA INSURANCE EXCHANGE'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. THE COURT TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL IS INSTRUCTED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH TRACKS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE LANGUAGE OF THE COURT'S TENTATIVE RULING. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: S. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or Summ Adjudication
Off Calendar Oct-22-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
Atty. KATY A. NELSON, Esq. of Woolls Peer Dollinger & Scher (Tel: 213-629-1600) for plaintiff CSAA Insurance Exchange;
Atty. FABI BEHNAM, Esq. of Lyfe Law, LLP (Tel: 888-203-1422) for defendant Ernesto Cardenas.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF CSAA INSURANCE EXCHANGE's Motion for Summary Judgment Or Summary Adjudication.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court takes the matter under submission.

Plaintiff's counsel is instructed to prepare and submit a proposed order which tracks verbatim the substantive language of the Court's tentative ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Court Reporter: Emily Husary, CSR No. 12148, Email: calicsr@yahoo.com, Tel: 707-799-5993 (302/RBU)
